creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: Looks good!  All the linters (portlint, portclippy, and portfmt) had no suggested changes.  As daniel.engberg.lists@pyret.net said, USES=localbase is appropriate (no need to submit a diff).  There is also a newer commit (just a Makefile change) that was submitted just after you opened this.  Build/run tests look good.
